lessons.title: A Short Coffee Chat
lessons.summary: 两位同事在咖啡店讨论工作节奏、休息和周末计划。

sentences.text: I was going to grab a coffee before the meeting starts.
sentences.meaning: 我打算在会议开始前买杯咖啡。
sentences.note: was going to 常被弱读成 /wəz gənə/。

sentences.text: Do you want me to get you anything?
sentences.meaning: 你要我帮你带点什么吗？
sentences.note: want me to 在自然语速中会连成一串。

sentences.text: Just a small latte would be great, thanks.
sentences.meaning: 一小杯拿铁就很好，谢谢。
sentences.note: would be 的 /d/ 和 /b/ 容易被吞掉。

sentences.text: I have been trying to cut down on sugar this week.
sentences.meaning: 这周我一直在努力减少糖分摄入。
sentences.note: trying to 常弱读成 /traɪnə/。

sentences.text: That sounds hard when the office keeps ordering snacks.
sentences.meaning: 办公室总是在订零食，这听起来挺难的。
sentences.note: keeps ordering 中的 /s/ 与元音连接。

sentences.text: I know, but I sleep better when I eat lighter at night.
sentences.meaning: 我知道，但晚上吃清淡点我睡得更好。
sentences.note: eat lighter at night 有多处连读。

vocab.example: I was going to grab a coffee.
I have been trying to cut down on sugar.

lessons.title: Weekend Plans
lessons.summary: 朋友之间讨论周末短途旅行、天气和改签计划。

sentences.text: We are thinking of taking the train to Brighton on Saturday.
sentences.meaning: 我们正在考虑周六坐火车去布莱顿。
sentences.note: thinking of 中 /ŋ/ 到元音自然连接。

sentences.text: If the weather holds up, we might stay for dinner.
sentences.meaning: 如果天气撑得住，我们可能会留下吃晚饭。
sentences.note: holds up 是连读重点。

sentences.text: Have you checked whether the late trains are still running?
sentences.meaning: 你查过晚班火车是否还在运行吗？
sentences.note: checked whether 中 /t/ 容易弱化。

sentences.text: Not yet, but I can look it up after lunch.
sentences.meaning: 还没有，但我午饭后可以查一下。
sentences.note: look it up 三词连续连接。

sentences.text: Let us book flexible tickets just in case.
sentences.meaning: 我们订可改签票吧，以防万一。
sentences.note: just in case 常整体听成一块。

vocab.example: If the weather holds up, we might stay.
I can look it up after lunch.
Book flexible tickets just in case.

lessons.title: A Product Update
lessons.summary: 产品经理汇报发布节奏、用户反馈和下一步计划。

sentences.text: The rollout went smoothly, but support tickets picked up on Tuesday.
sentences.meaning: 发布过程很顺利，但周二支持工单增多了。
sentences.note: picked up on Tuesday 有连续爆破和连读。

sentences.text: Most of the issues came from users who skipped the onboarding flow.
sentences.meaning: 大多数问题来自跳过引导流程的用户。
sentences.note: most of the 在自然语速中弱读明显。

sentences.text: We should make the first step shorter and move the tips into context.
sentences.meaning: 我们应该缩短第一步，把提示移到上下文里。
sentences.note: should make 与 first step 的辅音组合需要重点听。

sentences.text: I will send a revised prototype before the design review tomorrow.
sentences.meaning: 我会在明天设计评审前发一个修改版原型。
sentences.note: revised prototype 的重音位置影响理解。

sentences.text: After that, we can run another test with the new copy.
sentences.meaning: 之后我们可以用新的文案再跑一次测试。
sentences.note: run another test 中 run another 连读明显。

vocab.example: I will send a revised prototype.

lessons.title: Morning News Brief
lessons.summary: 一段关于交通、天气和城市活动的简短新闻摘要。

sentences.text: Morning commuters should expect delays across the northern line.
sentences.meaning: 早高峰通勤者应预计北线会有延误。
sentences.note: commuters 与 delays 是信息词。

sentences.text: Engineers are repairing signal equipment near Central Station.
sentences.meaning: 工程师正在中央车站附近维修信号设备。
sentences.note: repairing signal equipment 信息密度较高。

sentences.text: The weather bureau says showers will clear by early afternoon.
sentences.meaning: 气象局表示阵雨将在下午早些时候结束。
sentences.note: bureau 的发音容易误判。

sentences.text: A free music festival opens tonight along the riverfront.
sentences.meaning: 一场免费音乐节今晚将在河滨开幕。
sentences.note: opens tonight along 有多处连读。

vocab.example: The weather bureau says showers will clear.
The festival opens along the riverfront.
